summary: Batu and his companions are on a mission to explore the mysterious Dragon Vein. They encounter various obstacles, including a powerful demon that wreaks havoc, but Batu's child, who possesses special powers, helps them navigate through the challenges. Meanwhile, Magjicjon is struggling with his own darkness and feels conflicted about his role as a protector of Sarna. He seeks guidance from an old wise one, Mephisto, who reveals more about the past and the significance of the Dragon Vein.
key_moments: Batu and his companions encounter a powerful demon that wreaks havoc
The child with special powers helps them navigate through the challenges
Magjicjon struggles with darkness and seeks guidance from Mephisto
